response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK passport
ATTR passport : varchar : PK
ATTR customer_name : varchar
ATTR customer_surname : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_number, flight_date
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date : PK
ATTR seat_number : varchar
ATTR status_code : varchar
ATTR status : varchar
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_hour : time
ATTR belt_number : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_code : varchar
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK license_number
ATTR license_number : varchar : PK
ATTR airplane_model : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_license
ATTR crew_license : varchar : PK
ATTR crew_role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status : varchar

ENTITY FlightCrewAssignment
PK flight_number, flight_date, crew_license
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR flight_date : date : PK : FK
ATTR crew_license : varchar : PK : FK

ENTITY PassengerFlightBooking
PK passport, flight_number, flight_date
ATTR passport : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR flight_date : date : PK : FK
ATTR seat_number : varchar

REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=airport_departure
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=airport_arrival
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=license_number
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=status_code
REL Flight -> Flight : 0..1 -> 1 : FK=flight_number : FK=flight_date
REL FlightCrewAssignment -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_number, flight_date
REL FlightCrewAssignment -> CrewMember : 1..N -> 1 : FK=crew_license
REL PassengerFlightBooking -> Passenger : 1 -> 1 : FK=passport
REL PassengerFlightBooking -> Flight : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_number, flight_date
